source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The right-angled triangle shown has sides of length $5 \mathrm{~cm}, 12$ $\mathrm{cm}$ and $13 \mathrm{~cm}$. What, in $\mathrm{cm}$, is the radius of the inscribed semicircle whose diameter lies on the side of length $12 \mathrm{~cm}$ ? <image1>
